plot outline: A group of teenagers including Cindy Campbell and Bobby Prinze, accidentally hit a man when driving, and dispose of the body, but now they are being stalked by a very recognisable masked killer. The victim count increases, whilst Cindy must survive the carnage that has she has seen in so many films before.
title: Scary Movie
akas: Scream If You Know What I Did Last Halloween (United States)
I Know What You Did Last Halloween (United States)

other companies.name: Fun World Division of Easter Unlimited Inc.
